releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Add GitHub Actions by @sigrunixia in https://github.com/Obsidian-TTRPG-Community/Granite/pull/2
* Gemmy updated animations by @Behalter in https://github.com/Obsidian-TTRPG-Community/Granite/pull/3
* After Refactoring by @sigrunixia in https://github.com/Obsidian-TTRPG-Community/Granite/pull/5
* Patch: Adjust Gemmy State Management in preparation for Animation Changes by @sigrunixia in https://github.com/Obsidian-TTRPG-Community/Granite/pull/6
* :wrench: Updated Plugin from Gemmy to Granite by @sigrunixia in https://github.com/Obsidian-TTRPG-Community/Granite/pull/7

## New Contributors
* @Behalter made their first contribution in https://github.com/Obsidian-TTRPG-Community/Granite/pull/3
